edge_legend.TOP_EDGE: Positive PP edge (+1.5+) or strong avg vs soft defense (rank 10+).
edge_legend.OK_EDGE: PP edge on board or team leader vs soft/average defense.
edge_legend.AVOID: Negative PP edge or elite defense with weak production — skip OVER.
